query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.store_id, p.is_active, s.name as store_name, s.is_active as store_active FROM products p LEFT JOIN stores s ON p.store_id = s.id WHERE LOWER(p.name) LIKE '%pepsi%' LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.store_id, p.is_active, s.name as store_name, s.is_active as store_active FROM products p LEFT JOIN stores s ON p.store_id = s.id WHERE LOWER(p.name) LIKE '%pepsi%' LIMIT 10;
